sentences.target: Ich gehe kurz in die Buchhandlung.

translations.de: Ich gehe kurz in die Buchhandlung.
translations.en: I’m going into the bookstore for a moment.
translations.es: Voy a la librería un momento.
translations.fr: Je passe vite à la librairie.
translations.vi: Tôi ghé hiệu sách một lát.
translations.nl: Ik loop even de boekhandel binnen.
translations.hi: मैं थोड़ी देर के लिए किताबों की दुकान में जा रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg stikker en tur innom bokhandelen.
translations.id: Aku mau masuk ke toko buku sebentar.
translations.sv: Jag går in en sväng i bokhandeln.
translations.da: Jeg smutter lige ind i boghandleren.
translations.ja: ちょっと本屋に行ってくる。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun functioning as the subject.
Finite main verb, 1st-person singular present indicative.
Adverb modifying the verb, expressing duration ('for a short time').
Preposition governing accusative here, indicating direction into a place.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular, determiner for 'Buchhandlung'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'in' (accusative).

sentences.target: Die Buchhandlung hat heute länger geöffnet.

translations.de: Die Buchhandlung hat heute länger geöffnet.
translations.en: The bookstore is open longer today.
translations.es: Hoy la librería cierra más tarde.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, la librairie ferme plus tard.
translations.it: Oggi la libreria chiude più tardi.
translations.pt: A livraria hoje fica aberta até mais tarde.
translations.he: חנות הספרים פתוחה היום עד מאוחר.
translations.tr: Kitapçı bugün geç saatlere kadar açık.
translations.vi: Hôm nay hiệu sách mở cửa đến muộn.
translations.ar: المكتبة اليوم مفتوحة حتى وقت متأخر.
translations.nl: De boekhandel is vandaag langer open.
translations.hu: A könyvesbolt ma tovább nyitva tart.
translations.hi: किताबों की दुकान आज देर तक खुली है।
translations.el: Το βιβλιοπωλείο είναι ανοιχτό μέχρι αργά σήμερα.
translations.nb: Bokhandelen har åpent lenger i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini toko buku buka lebih lama.
translations.sv: Bokhandeln har öppet längre i dag.
translations.ro: Librăria e deschisă până mai târziu azi.
translations.da: Boghandlen har åbent længere i dag.
translations.ja: 本屋は今日は遅くまで開いている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular, determiner for the subject.
Common noun, feminine; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary, 3rd-person singular present; forms the perfect with the participle.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate.
Comparative adverb indicating extended duration.
Past participle functioning as the lexical verb in a perfect construction ('hat geöffnet').

sentences.target: Wir treffen uns vor der Buchhandlung.

translations.de: Wir treffen uns vor der Buchhandlung.
translations.en: We’ll meet in front of the bookstore.
translations.es: Nos vemos frente a la librería.
translations.fr: On se retrouve devant la librairie.
translations.pt: Nos encontramos em frente à livraria.
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau trước cửa hiệu sách.
translations.nl: We spreken af voor de boekhandel.
translations.hi: हम किताबों की दुकान के सामने मिलेंगे।
translations.id: Kita ketemu di depan toko buku.

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite main verb, 1st-person plural present indicative.
Reflexive personal pronoun, 1st-person plural accusative; direct object of 'treffen' in a reflexive usage.
Preposition governing dative, indicating location in front of something.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner for 'Buchhandlung'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'vor' (dative).

sentences.target: Neben der Buchhandlung gibt es ein Café.
sentences.reading: /ˈneːbən deːɐ ˈbuːxˌhandlʊŋ ɡɪbt ɛs aɪn kaˈfeː/

translations.de: Neben der Buchhandlung gibt es ein Café.
translations.ipa: /ˈneːbən deːɐ ˈbuːxˌhandlʊŋ ɡɪbt ɛs aɪn kaˈfeː/
translations.en: There’s a café next to the bookstore.
translations.es: Al lado de la librería hay una cafetería.
translations.fr: Il y a un café à côté de la librairie.
translations.it: Accanto alla libreria c’è un bar.
translations.zh-Hans: 书店旁边有一家咖啡馆。
translations.pt: Ao lado da livraria há um café.
translations.he: ליד חנות הספרים יש בית קפה.
translations.vi: Bên cạnh hiệu sách có một quán cà phê.
translations.nl: Naast de boekhandel zit een café.
translations.hu: A könyvesbolt mellett van egy kávézó.
translations.hi: किताबों की दुकान के बगल में एक कैफ़े है।
translations.el: Δίπλα στο βιβλιοπωλείο υπάρχει ένα καφέ.
translations.nb: Ved siden av bokhandelen ligger det en kafé.
translations.id: Di sebelah toko buku ada kafe.
translations.da: Ved siden af boghandlen ligger der en café.
translations.ja: 本屋の隣にカフェがある。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative, indicating adjacency.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner for 'Buchhandlung'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'Neben' (dative).
Finite verb, 3rd-person singular present; existential construction 'es gibt'.
Impersonal/expletive pronoun used with 'gibt' in the existential construction.
Indefinite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner for the direct object.
Common noun, neuter; direct object of 'gibt'.
